languages.text: "Зарков не меняется, Лорд-капитан. Один вид пожирает другой. Пусть они ослабят друг друга, прежде чем придем мы".

traits.locale_text: "Зарков не меняется, Лорд-капитан. Один вид пожирает другой. Пусть они ослабят друг друга, прежде чем придем мы".

languages.text: "Zarkov never changes, Lord Captain. One species devours another. Let them weaken each other before we come."
languages.original_text: "Зарков не меняется, Лорд-капитан. Один вид пожирает другой. Пусть они ослабят друг друга, прежде чем придем мы".

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov does not change, Lord Captain. One species devouring another. Let them weaken each other before we come."
"Zarkov never changes, Lord Captain. One species devours another. Let them weaken each other before we come."
"This is the way of things, Lord Captain. One species devouring another. These xenos have shown what they are worth. Let them nip at each other's flanks before we come."
"Zarkov does not change, Lord Captain. One species devouring another. Let them weaken each other before we come."
"Zarkov never changes, Lord Captain. One species devours another. Let them weaken each other before we come."

languages.text: 「これは自然の摂理です、艦長。ある種が他を食らう。この異種は自分の価値を示しました。我々が来る前に、互いの側面を噛みつくようにしましょう」
languages.original_text: "This is the way of things, Lord Captain. One species devouring another. These xenos have shown what they are worth. Let them nip at each other's flanks before we come."

traits.locale_text: 「これは自然の摂理です、艦長。ある種が他を食らう。この異種は自分の価値を示しました。我々が来る前に、互いの側面を噛みつくようにしましょう。」

languages.text: «Zarkov no cambia nunca, Lord Capitán. Una especie devora a otra. Dejemos que se debiliten antes actuar».
languages.original_text: "Zarkov never changes, Lord Captain. One species devours another. Let them weaken each other before we come."

traits.locale_text: «Zarkov no cambia nunca, Lord Capitán. Una especie devora a otra. Dejemos que se debiliten antes actuar».

languages.text: “扎尔科夫永远都是这副德行，舰长大人。物种之间互相残杀。在我们介入前，不妨让它们互相撕咬一番。”
languages.original_text: "Zarkov never changes, Lord Captain. One species devours another. Let them weaken each other before we come."

traits.locale_text: “扎尔科夫永远都是这副德行，舰长大人。物种之间互相残杀。在我们介入前，不妨让它们互相撕咬一番。”

languages.text: "Zarkov wird sich nie ändern, Lord Captain. Eine Spezies verschlingt die andere. Sollen sie sich gegenseitig schwächen, bevor wir kommen."
languages.original_text: "Zarkov never changes, Lord Captain. One species devours another. Let them weaken each other before we come."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov wird sich nie ändern, Lord Captain. Eine Spezies verschlingt die andere. Sollen sie sich gegenseitig schwächen, bevor wir kommen."

languages.text: "Zarkov hiç değişmiyor Lord Kaptan. Bir tür, bir diğerini yiyip bitiriyor. Biz gidene dek birbirlerini zayıflatsınlar."
languages.original_text: "Zarkov never changes, Lord Captain. One species devours another. Let them weaken each other before we come."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov hiç değişmiyor Lord Kaptan. Bir tür, bir diğerini yiyip bitiriyor. Biz gidene dek birbirlerini zayıflatsınlar."

languages.text: « Zarkov ne change jamais, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Une espèce en dévore une autre. Laissez-les s'affaiblir mutuellement avant notre arrivée. »
languages.original_text: "Zarkov never changes, Lord Captain. One species devours another. Let them weaken each other before we come."

traits.locale_text: « Zarkov ne change jamais, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Une espèce en dévore une autre. Laissez-les s'affaiblir mutuellement avant notre arrivée. »
